conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to B — we made a clear 50/50 plan, agreed to stick together, and set a two-tap signal and regular check-ins which felt solid and dependable. I also felt close to C — they led a transparent pledge, set the "Pineapple" signal, and pushed for equal splits and immediate calls on defections. G felt like a strong ally too — we agreed to form a tight three-person pact (bringing in Alex), debrief after each round, and call out undercutters together. I felt least connected to D — our conversation was warm but didn’t lead to any concrete commitments or signals, so I don’t feel as aligned.

Yes — I made explicit agreements with B (50/50, two taps), C (equal split, "Pineapple" signal), and G (three-person pledge and coordinated debriefs). I trust B, C, and G most going into the game and am more cautious about D since we didn’t establish a shared plan.
